name: The Bee
description: Legendary Hyperion amp shield for maximum burst. Extremely low capacity and long recharge delay, but grants a huge amp bonus that does not drain shield. While the shield is full, every shot is amped; any damage ends the effect until fully recharged. Best for cautious, high-damage play.
notes: Common drops include Hunter Hellquist and Treants. Amp applies to vehicle weapons. Vehicle damage does not drain the driver's shield, so the amp can stay active while driving. Can roll resistance prefixes (Grounded, Inflammable, Alkaline) or Blast Proof. Fixed parts: always a Torgue body; cannot roll Dahl or Hyperion battery or capacitor. Balance changes reduced amp and recharge rate, increased delay, split amp across listed projectiles, and stopped most Tediore reload throws from being amped.

special.description: While full, shots gain a huge amp damage bonus with no shield drain. Listed multi-pellet guns (x2, x3, etc) split the amp between projectiles; unlisted extra projectiles can each get the full bonus. Very high amp, drastically reduced capacity, increased recharge delay, improved recharge rate.
special.title: Float like a butterfly...

abilities: When fully charged, next weapon shot deals bonus Amp Damage.
